items.title: Jump Crypto’s ‘Firedancer’ is taking a slow and steady approach to its long-awaited Solana infrastructure rollout
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jump Crypto's cautious rollout of the Firedancer infrastructure could enhance Solana's network performance and reliability, potentially attracting more developers and users.

items.title: Italy’s largest bank more than doubles crypto holdings to $235M in Q1: Report
items.whyYouShouldCare: Italy's largest bank increasing its crypto holdings to $235M signals growing institutional interest in digital assets, which could boost Solana's market presence and liquidity.

items.title: Verus-Ethereum bridge hack drains $11.58M – Why DeFi trust is eroding
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $11.58M hack of the Verus-Ethereum bridge highlights vulnerabilities in DeFi, which may impact user trust and participation in Solana's ecosystem.
